name: Harvard Beets
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sliced raw beets or 2 cans (16 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, place the sliced raw beets and enough water to cover. Cook until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
2. Drain the beets, reserving 1/4 cup of liquid.
3. If using canned beets, drain them and reserve 1/4 cup of juice.
4. In another saucepan, combine sugar, flour, vinegar, and reserved beet juice. Cook over low heat until thickened.
5. Stir in the beets, salt, and butter. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
